description: Shared KenLM decoder-parameter sweep across trained DeepSpeech2 VEPRAD models.

paper_7gru_001.architecture: 2 convolution layers, 7 bidirectional GRU layers, hidden size 650
paper_7gru_001.label: 7-layer GRU

paper_7lstm_001.architecture: 2 convolution layers, 7 bidirectional LSTM layers, hidden size 650
paper_7lstm_001.label: 7-layer LSTM

paper_small_001.architecture: 2 convolution layers, 5 bidirectional GRU layers, hidden size 650
paper_small_001.label: paper-small 5-layer GRU

notes: This is a decoder-parameter sweep only; acoustic models were not retrained.
All candidates use filtered word-level 5-gram KenLM language models.
Validation/test transcript-overlap filtering was applied to the LM training corpus before KenLM training.
